channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Last Epoch Tweaks Omen Windows, Adds Helpful QoL Improvements, and Updated VFX and Sound
item.content:encoded:
Shattered Omens continues in Last Epoch, and the team’s latest update is all about player experience improvement, balance, and fixes. Notable, there is an adjustment to Omen Windows, quests, new VFX and sounds, and lots of fixes.

This season, Omen Windows are fractures in reality that, when shattered, releases an Omen and begins a random encounter where you have to defeat waves of fractured enemies before you can engage the Omen itself. The new patch tweaks Omen Windows in the Omen’s Veil Woven Echo to let all three windows overlap within a slightly larger space.

There are some helpful quality of life changes of note, with stat conversion effects now on the character sheets. This should give you that info fast. If you reach level 15 on a character and have the forging basics quest still active, it will autocomplete. 

If you’re dead, you’ll still be able to chat, since now you can interact with the chat window. It’s one of those small tweaks that you wonder why they never got to before.

Rogue and Sentinel get some ability tweaks, with Shield Throw plus the affix that converts it to void now with adjusted effects to be more in line with the intended conversion. Rogue Bladestorm Shadowstorm mode can be triggered using thrown daggers, and when that effect is triggered, there’s a new visual effect.

You can check out the patch notes for more info on all of the fixes, as well as the new and updated visual effects added throughout the game, in addition to balance changes, and more. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/last-epoch-tweaks-omen-windows-adds-helpful-qol-improvements-and-updated-vfx-and-sound-2000137837
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Echoes of Elysium Revamps New Player Experience And Expands High-Flying Movement Options In New Patch
item.content:encoded:
The Early Access sky-flying survival game Echoes of Elysium has introduced a refreshed new player experience, more movement options and more in its latest patch.

One of the first things mentioned is the new player experience; while they don’t get too much into detail they mention that they’ve “reworked how the game introduces itself so it’s clearer, smoother, and easier to get into, especially if you’re playing for the first time or bringing friends along.” 

There are new ways to get around to add “more player expression through movement” by implementing a Power Jump for a super-high jump, as well as progression for building out your Glider over time. Plus, performance is generally improved for the Glider. 

A new server hosting partner, the veteran-owned Imperium Hosting, has also been announced as part of this update as well to add more stability to the game’s networking. 

The rest of the patch has general improvements to Echoes of Elysium, as outlined in the full patch notes, including increased crafting and invention speeds, main menu upgrades, improved layouts for the starting area and early world, and generally better responsiveness to several gameplay and UI features across the board. 

Echoes of Elysium launched earlier this year into an Early Access phase, letting players dive into the solarpunk survival RPG to help iron out the development process. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/echoes-of-elysium-revamps-new-player-experience-and-expands-high-flying-movement-options-in-new-patch-2000137836
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Soulframe Preludes 14: The Duelo Adds New Pirate-esque Pact, New Weapons & Armor, Progression Path, & More
item.content:encoded:
Soulframe Preludes 14: The Duelo, is here, introducing the latest Pact for those who want a little more of a pirate-esque life. There’s a new progression path, new weapons, armor, new systems, new Siege, and a series of changes and improvements.

The Duelo gives this Preludes update its title and that’s for good reason. “Don the pact of Mestra Carmo. Break Duelo's pledge, and lead mutiny 'cross silvern sea. By dint of blade may you carve out a life of your own.” So while it’s not exactly the pirate Pact, the flavors are comparable.

This new Pact allows you to carve out your own path with abilities that let you wield a flintlock pistol to fire a piercing shot at enemies that also explodes on impact. Other abilities let you boost allies’ virtue and slow enemies. Even wield Grace Arcanic: Duo Duelo, which lets you spawn a ghost clone that will match your every attack. It's a two-for-one deal.

New armor is also here, Mestra’s Uniform, to let you sail as Mestra Carmo once did.  New weapons include the Navalha, a rapier, the Espadarte, a curved Cutlass, the Cenotaph, a twisted, baneblade, Silistavf, an elaborate staff, and Lyke-Wake, a “sword of a Mendicant lost. The shield of a love that endures,” and Digital Extremes continues to expand their lore even in weapons.

The update also adds the Orlick the Bicameral Progression, where you can help him to rebuild what was lost and help him understand Alca. You can help By learning more yourself, including studying creatures, learning to study Ode, and honing your own Spectral Sight to  improve it.

Earn his favor as he continues studying, getting to know him better and learning about his past and you can even get a renewed Journal. Complete the chapters in Orlick’s Sanctuary to unlock the Pensive Set.

A new Siege, Mirifuir, is also here, and Preludes 14 also includes a preview of Fallen Ode’n Skytowers, where in the dark ruins, creatures stir up from the ichor and from the maps. Part of the mystery here is figuring out what this tower once did. The challenge of course includes all those critters, including the Rovgot Wyrm, a corrupted creature that you'll have to worry about because it will burrow, move around and strike from below. Stay nimble.

Check out the patch notes for everything in the update, but there are improvements, like reworked Joineries and Runes, a new spirit guide, Wanderquill, And a series of other updates. 

Christina Gonzalez

Christina is MMORPG.COM’s News Editor and a contributor since 2011. Always a fan of great community and wondering if the same sort of magic that was her first guild exists anymore.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/soulframe-preludes-14-the-duelo-adds-new-pirate-esque-pact-new-weapons-and-armor-progression-path-and-more-2000137834
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
